About Revolvix

We're not a template shop.
We're your automation partner.

Revolvix Automations was built with a clear conviction: automation should adapt to how your business operates, not the other way around.

We are a boutique AI and automation consultancy. Every system we design is built ground-up after a deep understanding of your specific workflows, your tools, and your team.

Technology is never the goal, better business performance is.

Get in Touch
Bespoke, Not Templated
Every automation is built specifically for your business. No copy-paste, no shortcuts.
Consulting-First Approach
We understand before we build. Structured diagnosis, not assumptions.
Long-Term Partnership
We maintain and optimise your systems as your business evolves.
Enterprise-Grade Tools
We use proven, production-ready automation software. No experiments.
Our Approach

Three steps to operational clarity

A structured, repeatable process that ensures every automation we build drives measurable impact from day one.

01

Personalised Consulting

We don't conduct generic discovery calls. We deliver a structured, high-intent consultation to uncover operational inefficiencies, system fragmentation, and decision bottlenecks across your core business functions.

You receive
  • Comprehensive Business Assessment Report
  • Identified automation opportunities
  • Clear execution roadmap
02

Bespoke Automations

We design and build end-to-end automation systems tailored to your exact workflow. By connecting your tools, we eliminate manual handoffs and create consistent, scalable processes, built around you, not a template.

You receive
  • Custom-built automation system
  • Full integration across your stack
  • Tested, operational workflows
03

Maintaining & Optimising

We don't hand it off and disappear. As your business grows, we ensure your systems stay compliant, up-to-date, and optimised, adapting them to new requirements, scale, and opportunities.

You receive
  • Ongoing system maintenance
  • Performance monitoring
  • Continuous improvement cycles
Latest Projects

Transforming Workflows, Proven Results

Real automations built for real clients. See how we've eliminated manual bottlenecks and delivered measurable efficiency gains.

Marketing Automation

Automated Strategic Marketing Team

Before Revolvix

Manual content creation: trend research, ideation, design, copywriting, compliance, approval, all done by hand. Est. 1 week per 2 approved posts.

After Revolvix

Automated pipeline covering marketing planning, copywriting, image gen, compliance, and cloud storage. Streamlined from brief to post in hours.

"WOW, this truly saves so much time! We had no centralised system previously, I didn't know such a software is possible!"
Financial Research

Automated Equities Research Platform

Before Revolvix

Manual equity research: data gathering, financial modelling, valuation, competitor analysis, all done manually. Est. 1 week per company in depth.

After Revolvix

Automated screener with qualitative & quantitative analysis, insider tracking, earnings tracker, and investment-ready stock pitches generated automatically.

Result: Faster, more scalable equity research, data collection from official sources automated end-to-end, aligned to the client's own investment methodology.
Our Services

AI & Automation, built for your business

Two core service pillars. Each designed with consulting-first principles. No templates. No shortcuts.

AI-Powered Systems

We design intelligent AI agents and workflows that think, decide, and act so your team doesn't have to. From content generation to autonomous research pipelines, we harness the latest AI models and integrate them into your existing stack.

Each AI system is trained on your business context, follows your approval logic, and scales without additional headcount.

We do not resell off-the-shelf AI tools as "solutions"

Workflow Automation

We map your existing processes and replace manual handoffs with automated, reliable workflows. Connecting your CRM, project management tools, communication platforms, databases, and more, into a single, frictionless operational system.

The result: faster execution, fewer errors, and full operational visibility without disrupting how your team works.

We do not sell generic Zapier templates or cookie-cutter setups

Why we take a firm stance against templates

Every business has its own workflows, its own data, and its own constraints. A template built for the average organisation solves the average problem, which is rarely yours. Real results come from understanding your business first, then engineering a solution around it. That is the only approach we take.

Integrations

Connect your entire operational stack

We integrate with the tools your team already uses, no rip-and-replace required. If your business runs on it, we can connect it.

Gmail
Slack
Notion
Airtable
HubSpot
n8n
Google Sheets
Instagram

Outlook
OpenAI

WhatsApp

…and hundreds more. If you use it, we can connect it.

Why Choose Us

Built differently, by design

01

Zero-Risk Adoption

Start with a complimentary strategy consultation. 15 minutes to discover exactly how automation can optimise your business, with zero obligation. We identify the bottlenecks and high-impact opportunities first.

02

Designed With You, For You

We don't impose a solution. We identify your operational constraints, then design an automation blueprint aligned specifically to your priorities and ROI goals. Your business is the brief.

03

Proven Systems

We use enterprise-grade automation software that is tested and proven to work at scale. We stand behind the quality of every system we deploy, guaranteed client satisfaction, every time.

04

Optimisation & Maintenance

Growing fast? No problem. We ensure your systems remain compliant, performant, and up-to-date as your business evolves. We adapt your automation as you scale, not the other way around.

FAQs

Questions we get asked often

Most automation agencies resell templates or pre-built Zapier flows. We are a consulting-solutions company, every automation we build starts from a structured diagnosis of your business, and is engineered from scratch for your specific workflows. We don't take shortcuts, and we don't sell one-size-fits-all solutions.
The initial consultation is a structured, high-intent strategy session, not a sales call. We review your current workflows, identify manual handoffs and bottlenecks, and assess where automation can drive speed and accuracy. At the end, you receive a Comprehensive Business Assessment Report with identified opportunities and a clear path toward execution, whether you proceed with us or not.
We work with businesses across industries, from financial services firms to marketing-heavy operations, e-commerce, and professional services. If your team is spending significant time on repetitive operational tasks, there is almost certainly an automation opportunity. Our structured consultation will tell you exactly where.
Not at all. We handle every technical aspect of the build, from system architecture to integration and testing. Your role is to help us understand your business; our role is to translate that into a working automation system. We keep you informed throughout in plain language, not technical jargon.
We don't disappear after delivery. We offer ongoing maintenance and optimisation services to ensure your systems remain up-to-date, compliant, and performing as your business evolves. If you scale quickly, we scale your systems with you.
It depends on what you need. A straightforward automation, such as a single-workflow pipeline or a basic integration, can typically be delivered within 2 weeks. More complex systems involving multiple integrations, custom logic, or AI components can take 1 to 2 months. We agree on a realistic timeline before any work begins and keep you updated throughout.
Pricing is determined on a project-by-project basis, based on the scope and complexity of what we build together. There are no fixed packages. More importantly, we only charge once you are satisfied with the delivered system. If it doesn't work the way we agreed, we don't consider the project done. Your satisfaction is the condition for payment, not a courtesy. Ongoing maintenance, where applicable, is available at a low monthly cost to keep your systems up-to-date and running smoothly.
